creator: andrej@ebert.su
text:
(In reply to Mark Felder from comment #3)

I don't have a CURRENT machine to test, but it's definitely (still) present on

FreeBSD 199-SERVER 11.0-BETA2 FreeBSD 11.0-BETA2 #0 r303255: Sun Jul 24 11:45:56 CEST 2016     root@199-SERVER:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/MASK  amd64

so you should see it on your 11.0-ALPHA6 outside of the 10.2 jail, or inside a 10-STABLE (beginning with base r296727) or 11-STABLE jail.
